view.title: Validate persona scenario #1

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of anomaly detection on API usage patterns, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the system's behavior in this scenario. The linked use case discusses the need for stable grant contracts and source-level selection, but it does not provide specific evidence of the system's response to the simulated anomaly detection. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as it lacks the necessary data to confirm or deny the expected results.
